empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: A skill is a reusable, text-only instruction block you bind to review agents. Create one or import a Markdown file.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to view and edit it.

card.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

config.title: Configuration
config.name: Name
config.nameHint: A kebab-case slug, unique in this workspace. Used as the {slug}.md filename.
config.nameTaken: A skill with this name already exists.
config.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — write it directively (what the agent should do).
config.descriptionPlaceholder: Rubric for evaluating overall PR quality…

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.
preview.empty: This skill has no body yet.

versions.title: Version history
versions.subtitle: Every save snapshots the body so eval runs stay reproducible against the exact text they scored.
versions.restoreConfirm: Restore v{version}? This creates a new current version with that body.

evals.title: Evals
evals.body: Run this skill against your eval cases to measure its effect. Coming in a later lesson.

stats.title: Stats
stats.body: Usage, pull frequency, accept rate, and findings by category. Coming in a later lesson.

create.descriptionPlaceholder: What this skill instructs the agent to do

import.dropHint: Drop a file or click to choose. Archive scripts and binaries are never extracted or run.
import.trustTitle: You are importing someone else's instructions
import.trustBody: An imported skill becomes text in your agent's prompt. Review the body before you enable it for any agent — treat it as untrusted.
